intended_use: The PhysCade System is intended for the analysis, display, and storage of cardiac electrophysiological data and maps for analysis by a physician. The clinical significance of utilizing the PhysCade Sy
intended_use_full: The PhysCade System is intended for the analysis, display, and storage of cardiac electrophysiological data and maps for analysis by a physician. The clinical significance of utilizing the PhysCade System to help identify areas with intra-cardiac atrial electrograms exhibiting local early activated potentials and other features of interest during atrial arrhythmias has not been established by clinical investigations.
target_condition: atrial arrhythmias (atrial fibrillation and atrial tachycardia)
